task: Find the current league leader in total blocked shots.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to NBA.com Stats and opened the 'Players Traditional' leaderboard page sorted by BLK with PerMode=Totals. The final page title and URL confirm the relevant stats page: https://www.nba.com/stats/players/traditional?sort=BLK&dir=-1&PerMode=Totals. On that page, the visible filters show Season 2025-26, Season Type = Playoffs, and Per Mode = Totals, and the top row lists Victor Wembanyama with 38 blocks. This directly supports the answer that the current leader in total blocked shots is Victor Wembanyama with 38.
final_result_response: Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs is the current NBA leader in total blocked shots, with 38 total blocks on NBA.com’s stats leaderboard.
action_history: Opening NBA website: const nbaPage1 = await openTab('https://www.nba.com/');
Opening total blocks leaderboard: await nbaPage1.locator('e193').click();
